verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Though I'm walking through the valley, of the darkest hour i've known, Lord, don't You leave me all alone. when i'm surrounded by the shadows that seem to feed my fear I will trust you Lord though i may not feel you near.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I know that your love is unfailing oh i know that your grace is so amazing o i know even though my faith be shaken o i still know that i'll never be forsaken your always faithful i know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When my bed has been floating on the flood o all my tears it seems as though my joy has disappeared still i wil not put my hope in what i feel or see i will cling to you and trust you're holding me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord i don't know where I'm walking, but i'll take you day by day. and i'll hold Your hand. and You will lead the way.
